rationale: Hard pass. The archetype is licensed Dragon Ball Z anime combat footage — palette (gold/indigo/purple), shonen power-fantasy aesthetic, and male-skewing teen/anime audience all clash with Destiny Run's bright sky-blue, low-poly, female-skewing casual moral-choice runner. Beyond the audience and visual mismatch, using Goku IP carries serious Toei/Bandai trademark risk and the "charge-and-punch" hook tells users nothing about swipe-to-steer or angel/devil path-choice mechanics, so CTR-to-install quality would crater.
